headline: DoorDash Fuel Relief And New Tasks Signal Shift In Gig Worker Model
summary: DoorDash (NasdaqGS:DASH) launches an emergency relief program aimed at helping drivers manage higher fuel costs linked to surging gas prices during the Iran war. The company introduces a new "Tasks" initiative, allowing couriers to earn income from digital assignments alongside traditional food and grocery deliveries. Both programs represent operational updates to DoorDash’s gig worker offering, with potential implications for how drivers use the platform and how the company structures its...
